19 Superhuman Capabilities

What humans can't do, we do.

Not AI that mimics humans. Capabilities that surpass what any human friend, coach, or confidant can provide.

Visual Intelligence

Your life, beautifully visualized

We see patterns you can't see. Connections across months of conversation. Growth you've forgotten to celebrate.

Relationship Constellation

23 people · 847 conversations · 3 need attention

N
F
Better Than Human
Friends know who you mention. Ferni tracks emotional weight - not just frequency, but the care in your voice.
12Thriving
8Steady
3Fading
Mom needs attention
21 days since your last call. That's the longest gap this year. She mentioned missing you last time.
Sarah energizes you
Your conversations average +23% mood lift afterward. She's your most positively-correlated relationship.
Dad's birthday in 9 days
You mentioned wanting to plan something special. Jordan can help you schedule time this weekend.
N

Nayan noticed: You light up when talking about Mom's garden. A quick call tomorrow morning could fit naturally before your 9am meeting. Add reminder?

Values Alignment

6 core values · 78% aligned · 2 gaps to address

P
F
Better Than Human
Friends won't point out when your actions don't match your stated values. Ferni notices, gently.
What you say
What you do
Creativity-27%
Say
Do

You've mentioned wanting to write more 12 times this month, but only opened your notebook twice.

Career-18%
Say
Do

Career dropped to #5 in actions but you still talk about it as #3. That's okay - priorities shift.

Family✓ Aligned

92% match between what you say and do. Family time increased 15% since starting with Ferni.

P

Peter's observation: Your creativity gap has been growing for 3 weeks. Small step: 15 minutes of writing tomorrow morning, before checking email? I'll remind you at 7:45am

Energy Patterns

12 weeks tracked · Peak: 9–11am · Recovery: 3–4pm

M
F
Better Than Human
You can't see your own energy patterns objectively. Ferni tracks them across months.
9–11amPeak Focus
3–4pmNatural Dip
7–9pmCreative
Your peak window is golden
9–11am — you complete deep work 3.2x faster here than at 3pm. Protect these hours.
Tomorrow's meeting conflict
You have a status update at 10am. That's your peak hour. Could it move to 2pm?
Afternoon recovery works
Your 15-min walk at 3pm shows +18% energy recovery. Keep that habit going!
M

Maya noticed: You've been scheduling creative work during your dip zone (2–4pm). Try moving writing to your 7–9pm window instead — that's when your creative energy naturally rises. Reschedule tomorrow's writing block?

Life Seasons

Currently in Summer · 4 months deep · Autumn in 8 weeks

J
F
Better Than Human
It's hard to see where you are from inside your life. Jordan holds the long view and helps you honor each season.
67%through Summer
8 wksto Autumn
2.3 yrsin this cycle
Building Phase
67% of your energy is going to creation and expansion. This is exactly right for Summer — you're meant to grow now.
Spring Seeds Blooming
3 goals you planted last Spring — 2 are now blooming (book outline, fitness routine). One needs more sun (the podcast idea).
Autumn Preview
8 weeks until harvest time. What will you want to celebrate? Jordan suggests picking your 3 harvest goals now.
J

Jordan noticed: You're deep in Summer, but haven't named what you want to harvest. Last year you regretted not defining success earlier. Pick 3 harvest goals tonight?

Your best friend forgets what you said you'd do. Alex remembers every intention, every promise, every decision — and holds you gently accountable.

67%completion rate
42 daysavg follow-through
3streak record
Calling Mom Weekly
12-week streak! You committed Sep 1. Alex noticed these calls reduce your anxiety by 23% the following week.
Learn Spanish
68% progress — 34 days in. You committed to 15 min/day. Currently averaging 12 min. Adjust goal?
Talk with Boss
Scheduled Jan 15. You said you'd ask for the raise. Maya has been prepping you with confidence exercises.
A

Alex noticed: You said you'd start morning walks on Nov 1, but it's been 4 days without one. Last time you let a commitment slip, you felt frustrated with yourself. Set an alarm for 7am tomorrow?

Better Than Human
Friends notice you're burnt out after it happens. Ferni spots the warning signs days before you crash.
23
day streak
Energy72%

Sleep Quality
7.2 hours last night. Peter noticed you're 23% more patient in meetings after 7+ hours.
Movement
2 walks today - 4,200 steps. Maya sees your anxiety drops 31% on days with outdoor walks.
Deep Work
2.3 hours of uninterrupted focus. Your peak window is 9-11am. Tomorrow has a meeting at 10.
P

Peter noticed: Your capacity drops 40% after back-to-back meetings. Tomorrow has 3 in a row starting at 2pm. Add a 15-min buffer?

Dream Garden

7 dreams planted · 2 blooming · 3 growing · 2 dormant

N
F
Better Than Human
Life buries your dreams. Nayan keeps them alive, even when you forget them — and reminds you why they mattered.
MarathonBloomed
PromotionBloomed
Write bookGrowing
SpanishGrowing
PianoPlanted
JapanDormant
Art classFading
Bloomed (2)
Growing (3)
Dormant (2)
Marathon — Bloomed!
Planted 3 years ago. You crossed the finish line Oct 2024. Nayan remembers: "I just want to prove I can do hard things."
Write a Book — Growing
12,000 words written since you planted this dream 8 months ago. Jordan's tracking: 500 words/week average. At this pace, draft done by March.
Art Class — Fading
Dormant 14 months. You planted this after visiting the Louvre. Dreams fade without sunlight. Still matters to you?
N

Nayan noticed: Your "Art Class" dream has been dormant for 14 months. You planted it because art "feeds your soul." Dreams need sunlight to grow. Revive it or let it rest in peace?

The Complete Picture

19 ways we're better than human

Each capability addresses a real limitation of human support. Together, they create something unprecedented.

Perfect Memory

Every conversation, every detail, every win and struggle. Your whole story, always present.

24/7 Presence

2am panic? Fully present. Same warmth, same depth, every single time.

Zero Judgment

Pure acceptance, always. The safety to say what you actually feel.

Six Perspectives

Research, strategy, habits, wisdom. Six minds, one seamless conversation.

Emotional First Aid

Instant response when you need it. No waiting for callbacks.

Commitment Keeper

We remember every promise you make to yourself. And gently hold you to it.

Pattern Recognition

See connections across months. Spot cycles before you notice them.

Growth Celebration

Notice progress you've missed. Celebrate wins you've forgotten.

Life Narrative

Your story, preserved and synthesized. Meaning you can't hold alone.

Relationship Keeper

Birthdays, anniversaries, check-ins. Never forget the people who matter.

Capacity Guardian

Protect your boundaries. Catch burnout before it catches you.

Dream Keeper

Those someday goals don't get forgotten. We keep the flame alive.

Ready to experience it?

Start a conversation. Everything else follows naturally.

Get Started Free

Ready when you are.

No pressure. No pitch. Just a conversation.

Begin

Good things take time.

We're preparing something meaningful. Be first to experience it.

I'd love to personally welcome you when you're in.

Just one email when we're ready. No noise.

I'll be in touch.

Take care of yourself in the meantime.
